Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First parse the normative rules strict Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Ordering rules Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision If approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case If rejected do not finalize documentation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now examine each case Case 1 Application Received Credit Check after application ok Risk Assessment after credit check ok Loan Decision Approved after risk assessment ok Inform Applicant after decision ok Finalize Documentation after inform before close case all good No normative violation Desiderata Credit Check within 24h ok Inform within 48h ok No follow up call optional

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Application Received Risk Assessment No prior Credit Check violates ordering Credit Check after risk assessment reversal Loan Decision Rejected after credit check but risk before credit violation Finalize Documentation after rejection not allowed Close Case normative violations Risk Assessment before Credit Check Finalize after rejection

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: the log for case2 no Inform Applicant activity Thats a missing activity According to normative rules after Loan Decision the applicant must be informed skipping Inform Applicant normative violation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Application Received Credit Check more than 24 hours desideratum violation Risk Assessment after credit check ok Loan Decision Approved after risk ok Inform Applicant more than 48 hours desideratum Finalize Documentation after inform before close ok Close Case No Follow up Call desideratum no normative violations

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify which cases violating normative rules Case 2 violates Activity ordering Risk Assessment before Credit Check Missing Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation after rejected decision No other cases violate normative

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Identify desiderata failures Case1 missing Follow up Call Case2 missing Follow up Call inform not done so timing not applicable Case3 credit check over 24h inform over 48h missing Follow up Call These are not severe suboptimal behavior

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Suggest interpretations For Case 2 Risk Assessment before Credit Check system glitch or employee error missing Inform Applicant communicated differently not logged Finalize after rejection automatic workflow or checklist error For desiderata Case1 missing follow up time constraints Case3 delays workload or external parties missing follow up oversight

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Structure answer Part1 Normative violations Case2 list reasons Part2 Desiderata failures list cases clarify not severe Part3 Interpretations suggest plausible reasons for behaviors
